summary: Completed frontend testing of User Management permissions display and Items/Catalogue colorful cards. All requested features verified working. Fixed import path issues in new POS and Scanner components. Fixed gradient overlay blocking clicks in ItemsPage.
passed_tests: User Management: Edit user opens modal with Basic Info and Permissions tabs
User Management: Permissions tab loads with all 31 permissions grouped by 7 categories
User Management: Permission toggles show GREEN background and checkmark (✓) for granted permissions
User Management: Permission toggles show RED background and X mark (✗) for denied permissions
User Management: Grant All button grants all 31 permissions with toast notification
User Management: Revoke All button revokes all 31 permissions with toast notification
User Management: Permission count summary shows 'X of 31 permissions granted'
User Management: Green badge shows '✓ X Granted' count
User Management: Red badge shows '✗ X Denied' count
User Management: Category headers show granted/denied counts (e.g., '5 2' for General)
User Management: Individual permission toggles update counts correctly
Items/Catalogue: Cards display with colorful gradient backgrounds (violet, blue, emerald, orange, pink, indigo)
Items/Catalogue: Discount badges show '-X% OFF' in red
Items/Catalogue: Stock badges show 'X pcs' in green/orange/red based on stock level
Items/Catalogue: Save amount badges show 'Save ₹X' in green when item has discount
Items/Catalogue: Export dropdown opens with PDF, Excel/CSV, WhatsApp share options
Items/Catalogue: Export as PDF option available
Items/Catalogue: Export as Excel/CSV option available
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed import paths in POS components (POSCart.js, POSProductGrid.js, POSCheckoutModal.js) - changed '../components/ui/' to '../ui/'
Fixed import paths in Scanner components (ScannerUploadZone.js, ScannerPreviewTable.js) - changed '../components/ui/' to '../ui/'
Fixed gradient overlay in ItemsPage.js - added 'pointer-events-none' to prevent click interception
New POS components created but not yet integrated into main POSPage (as noted by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Management permissions display fully working with green/red indicators, Grant All/Revoke All buttons, and permission count summary. Items page has colorful gradient cards with discount badges, stock badges, and save amount indicators. Export dropdown works with PDF, Excel, WhatsApp options. New POS components (POSCart, POSProductGrid, POSCheckoutModal) and Scanner components (ScannerUploadZone, ScannerPreviewTable) have been created with fixed import paths but are not yet integrated into main pages.

user_management_permissions.edit_modal: WORKING - Opens with Basic Info and Permissions tabs
user_management_permissions.grant_all_button: WORKING - Grants all 31 permissions with toast
user_management_permissions.revoke_all_button: WORKING - Revokes all 31 permissions with toast
user_management_permissions.green_indicators: WORKING - Green background, checkmark, and 'Granted' badge for enabled permissions
user_management_permissions.red_indicators: WORKING - Red background, X mark, and 'Denied' badge for disabled permissions
user_management_permissions.permission_count_summary: WORKING - Shows 'X of 31 permissions granted' with green/red badges
user_management_permissions.category_counts: WORKING - Each category header shows granted/denied counts
user_management_permissions.individual_toggles: WORKING - Clicking toggles updates counts and colors correctly

items_catalogue.colorful_gradients: WORKING - 6 color schemes (violet, blue, emerald, orange, pink, indigo)
items_catalogue.export_dropdown: WORKING - PDF, Excel/CSV, WhatsApp share options

component_refactoring.pos_components: CREATED - POSCart, POSProductGrid, POSCheckoutModal (import paths fixed)
component_refactoring.integration_status: NOT YET INTEGRATED - Components created but not used in main pages
